prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey, you've got this! That task has been lurking long enough—now's the time to tackle it head-on. Break it into bite-sized pieces, and remember, the sooner you start, the sooner you'll feel that sweet relief of accomplishment. Dive in—you're stronger than you think! 🚀
